neteyam and you were sent by his father to visit a neighbouring clan. just some regular arrangements and talks, yet it meant a lot to neteyam that his father trusted him with such duties, he was to be olo'eyktan eventually after all.

once a long but successful day comes to an end, you eat with the clan before you get lead to an kelku that is reserved for the two of you. only to find that there's just one snonivi inside.

(slow-burn-y)

q/p = quick prompt
